label: Strategy Performance
description: Filterable strategy table grouped by asset class with real-time P&L, status, and mode indicators.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx

0.4.note: No any types or @ts-ignore — uses Record<string, unknown> casts

0.5.note: No lib/mocks/ imports in widget file

0.7.note: Added: empty filtered list shows 'No strategies match the current filters'; zero data available shows 'No strategy data available'

0.8.note: OverviewData interface has no error field — runtime errors caught by WidgetErrorBoundary (L0.1). Data-unavailable state (allFiltered empty after loading) shows 'No strategy data available'. Full error field requires context change (out of widget-file-only scope).

0.9.note: No dead code blocks; _sp prefix on unused strategyPerformance destructure is intentional suppression

1.1.note: Data sourced exclusively via useOverviewDataSafe() → ctx.filteredSortedStrategies; no inline fetch or direct imports

1.2.note: use-overview-page-data.ts calls useGlobalScope() (line 117 + 247) and filters strategies by scope.organizationIds, scope.clientIds, scope.strategyIds before placing them in context.filteredSortedStrategies

1.3.note: strategyPerformance memo in use-overview-page-data.ts re-filters on context.organizationIds change; widget re-renders with updated data

1.4.note: context.clientIds filter applied in strategyPerformance memo (lines 263-268 in use-overview-page-data.ts)

1.5.note: context.strategyIds filter applied in strategyPerformance memo (lines 269-271 in use-overview-page-data.ts)

1.6.note: Empty scope arrays → no filter branches execute → full allStrategies set returned

1.7.note: overview-data-context.tsx imports PnLBreakdown and TimeSeriesPoint type-only from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data. use-overview-page-data.ts imports CLIENTS, ORGANIZATIONS, SEED_SERVICES, getAlertsForScope, getStrategiesForScope, getAggregatedPnlForScope from lib/mocks — these are used as mock fallback data only when isMockDataMode() is true, not as primary data sources. Widget file itself is clean. Context-level mock usage is gated behind data-mode flag (acceptable pattern) but the type imports from lib/mocks in context are a minor hygiene issue.

knownIssues: OverviewData interface has no error field — L0.8 relies on WidgetErrorBoundary for render errors and data-unavailable state for fetch failures. Adding a proper error field requires modifying overview-data-context.tsx.
overview-data-context.tsx imports PnLBreakdown/TimeSeriesPoint type-only from lib/mocks/fixtures/trading-data — minor hygiene; these are type-only imports and do not cause runtime mock data leakage.
Pause/Resume action buttons in table rows call e.stopPropagation() but have no action handler wired — functional gap for L4.1.
findings: L1.7 finding: use-overview-page-data.ts (the data assembly hook) imports runtime values from lib/mocks (CLIENTS, ORGANIZATIONS, SEED_SERVICES, getAlertsForScope, getStrategiesForScope, getAggregatedPnlForScope) as mock fallbacks behind isMockDataMode() guard. This is acceptable data-mode gating, not a hard violation, but should be migrated to lib/constants/ or lib/fixtures/ as part of the broader mock-to-fixture migration.
